revision.text:
[[青森市]]に関する項目一覧。
[[Category:青森県|あおもりし]]

revision.comment: cat
revision.text:
[[青森市]]に関するカテゴリ。

revision.comment: カテゴリ書換
revision.text:
[[青森市]]に関するカテゴリ。

revision.comment: ロボットによる 追加: [[ko:분류:아오모리 시]]
revision.text:
[[青森市]]に関するカテゴリ。
[[Category:青森県の市町村|あおもりし]] [[Category:都道府県庁所在地|あおもりし]]

revision.comment: r2.7.1) (ロボットによる 追加: [[zh:Category:青森市]]
+[[Category:中核市]]
r2.7.1) (ロボットによる 追加: [[en:Category:Aomori, Aomori]]
[[Special:Contributions/219.57.9.134|219.57.9.134]] ([[User talk:219.57.9.134|会話]]) による版を ZéroBot による版へ[[H:RV|巻き戻し]]
ロボットによる 追加: [[fa:رده:آئوموری]]
[[User:Addbot|ボット]]: 言語間リンク 6 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[d:q6807386]] に転記
[[Category:2005年に成立した行政区画]]を除去; [[Category:2005年設置の日本の市町村]]を追加 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
+cat
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
categorizing unused categories

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:青森市]] [[ar:Category:آوموري (آوموري)]] [[az:Category:Aomori]] [[commons:Category:Aomori, Aomori]] [[cs:Category:Aomori]] [[de:Category:Aomori]] [[fa:Category:آئوموری]] [[fi:Category:Aomori]] [[fr:Category:Aomori]] [[ilo:Category:Aomori, Aomori]] [[it:Category:Aomori]] [[ko:Category:아오모리시]] [[pl:Category:Aomori]] [[pt:Category:Aomori (cidade)]] [[ru:Category:Аомори]] [[tg:Category:Аомори]] [[uk:Category:Аоморі]] [[ur:Category:اوموری]] [[zh:Category:青森市]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:History_of_Aomori,_Aomori]].

revision.comment: Bot: jawiki-title redirect to EN category

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Wikidata links on [[Category:" to "Wikidata links on [[:Category:"
revision.text:

revision.text: [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]][[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]][[en:Aomori (city)]][[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]][[en:Aomori (city)]] [[category:Tier 2 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:青森市]] [[ar:Category:آوموري (آوموري)]] [[az:Category:Aomori]] [[commons:Category:Aomori, Aomori]] [[cs:Category:Aomori]] [[de:Category:Aomori]] [[fa:Category:آئوموری]] [[fi:Category:Aomori]] [[fr:Category:Aomori]] [[ilo:Category:Aomori, Aomori]] [[it:Category:Aomori]] [[ko:Category:아오모리시]] [[pl:Category:Aomori]] [[pt:Category:Aomori (cidade)]] [[ru:Category:Аомори]] [[tg:Category:Аомори]] [[uk:Category:Аоморі]] [[ur:Category:اوموری]] [[zh:Category:青森市]] This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:History_of_Aomori,_Aomori]]. {{translated page|ja|Category:青森市|version=79926208|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
1 revision imported: importing enwiki overwrite categories
Text replacement - "Tier 2 enwiki" to "Tier 2 Categories with enwiki"
1 revision imported: importing enwiki overwrite categories
Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 2 enwiki]]" to "[[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
revision.text:
==English Content== {{Portal|Japan}} {{Commons category|Aomori, Aomori}} {{Cat main|Aomori (city)}} [[ar:Category:تصنيف:آوموري (آوموري)]] [[az:Category:Kateqoriya:Aomori]] [[co:commons:Category:Category:Aomori, Aomori]] [[cs:Category:Kategorie:Aomori]] [[de:Category:Kategorie:Aomori]] [[dewiki:Category:Kategorie:Aomori]] [[en:Category:Aomori (city)]] [[en:Category:Aomori (city)]] [[fa:Category:رده:آئوموری]] [[fi:Category:Luokka:Aomori]] [[fr:Category:Catégorie:Aomori]] [[ilo:Category:Kategoria:Aomori, Aomori]] [[it:Category:Categoria:Aomori]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:青森市]] [[ko:Category:분류:아오모리시]] [[pl:Category:Kategoria:Aomori]] [[pt:Category:Categoria:Aomori (cidade)]] [[ru:Category:Категория:Аомори]] [[tg:Category:Гурӯҳ:Аомори]] [[uk:Category:Категорія:Аоморі]] [[ur:Category:زمرہ:اوموری]] [[zh:Category:Category:青森市]]
==Local Content== [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|Q6807386}} [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Cities in Aomori Prefecture]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]] [[Category:Categories]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6807386)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
